criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance financial management features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and official documentation.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall usability and intuitiveness of the app's interface and features.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of financial management tools offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, and comparisons.

criteria.name: Security Measures
criteria.description: The robustness of the app's security protocols to protect user data.
criteria.sources: App security documentation, third-party security assessments, and user feedback.

criteria.name: Cost Efficiency
criteria.description: The value provided by the app relative to its cost, including free features and premium offerings.
criteria.sources: Pricing information, user reviews, and cost-benefit analyses.
